codeReview.summary: RecoveryRecipe system implemented correctly in swell-orchestrator with all required types: FailureScenario (with builder pattern, pattern matching, and context), BackoffStrategy (Fixed/Linear/Exponential/ExponentialWithJitter), RecoveryStep enum (Retry/Rollback/Escalate/SkipAndContinue), RecoverySteps wrapper, and RecoveryRecipe registry with default fallback. 47 unit tests pass covering all types, serde roundtrips, pattern matching, and VAL-TASK-008 assertions.

issues.description: Variable 'recipe' in test_recovery_recipe_default_recipe is declared as mut but never mutated. Suggest removing the mut modifier. This is a minor style warning from clippy.

summary: Implementation fully satisfies the feature description: RecoveryRecipe maps FailureScenario to typed RecoverySteps (Retry with backoff, Rollback, Escalate, SkipAndContinue), and unregistered scenarios fall back to a default recipe. All 47 tests pass, doc tests pass, clippy clean (with one unused_mut warning). The system is ready for integration with the broader task-lifecycle machinery.
